item.title: Lannett Company Inc.: Primidone Tablets USP, 250mg, 100-count bottle, Rx only, Recall
item.product: Primidone Tablets USP, 250mg, 100-count bottle, Rx only,
item.summary: Cross contamination with other products: API contaminated with trace amounts of Acemetacin API. Product details: Primidone Tablets USP, 250mg, 100-count bottle, Rx only, Distributed by: Lannett Company, Inc., Philadelphia, PA 19136, NDC 0527-1231-01.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
